academic.passage: Mountain formation is a fascinating geological process primarily driven by tectonic forces. These forces, which involve the movement of the Earth's crust, can create significant elevations over extensive periods. The varying terrain of mountains influences local climates and ecosystems, as wind patterns and precipitation are affected by the topography. Understanding mountain formation helps us appreciate the dynamic nature of our planet and the intricate relationships within different environments.

questions.q: What is the main idea of the passage?
options: Mountain formation is influenced by tectonic forces.
Mountains affect local climates and ecosystems.
The geological process of mountain formation takes millions of years.
Mountain terrain varies greatly in elevation.
questions.explain: 這個選項正確因為文章的主題是關於山脈形成的地質過程，並強調了這些過程如何受構造力量的影響。
這個選項正確因為文中提到山脈的形成主要是由於地殼的運動，也就是構造力量。

questions.q: What can be inferred about mountain ecosystems?
options: They are uniform across different regions.
They are highly influenced by local weather patterns.
They require no interaction with the climate.
They are only found in tropical areas.
questions.explain: 這個選項正確因為文中提到山脈的地形會影響當地氣候，因此可以推斷生態系統也會受影響。

questions.q: What does the word 'topography' most likely mean in this context?
options: The arrangement of natural and artificial physical features.
The process of erosion and sedimentation.
The impact of weather on landscapes.
questions.explain: 這個選項正確因為在這個上下文中，'topography' 指的是自然和人工地形特徵的安排。

daily.passage: Attention students! The university library will be closed for maintenance this Saturday from 9 AM to 5 PM. Please plan your study time accordingly and make sure to return any borrowed books before the closure.

questions.q: When will the university library be closed?
questions.explain: 這個選項正確因為公告中明確提到圖書館將於本週六關閉。

questions.q: What should students do before the library closes?
questions.explain: 這個選項正確因為公告提醒學生在圖書館關閉前歸還所借的書籍。
